opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My mouth and throat are on fire, and I can't even swallow my own spit. It hurts too much to drink.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Severe mouth/throat pain and can't swallow fluids, food or my tablets.

symptom_narrative.onset: sore mouth 3 days ago, much worse in 24 hours
symptom_narrative.duration: 3 days, severe for 24h; no swallowing for ~12h
symptom_narrative.character: intense burning of the tongue and cheeks with thick white patches
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: can't swallow saliva; hasn't drunk for 12 hours
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: white curd-like patches in the mouth; feels weak and dry
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: bed-bound, weak, not taking usual tablets

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: frail, recent urine infection treated with antibiotics
high blood pressure (tablets currently not swallowed)

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: just finished cephalexin for a urine infection

objective_data_offered.value: thick white curd-like patches over the tongue, cheeks and back of the throat; mouth looks dry
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: camera view; cannot scrape plaques or examine the swallowing tube

objective_data_offered.value: heart rate around 102, blood pressure 105/65, temperature 37.4; hasn't passed much urine
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: nursing-reported; signs of dehydration (dry mucous membranes, low-normal BP, tachycardia)
